hypothesis: Fine-tuning SAM 2 on synthetic liquid-phase TEM video data will produce a segmentation model (SAM-EM) that achieves superior real-time particle segmentation accuracy compared to a task-specific U-Net baseline across varying signal-to-noise conditions, because SAM 2's video object tracking architecture and large pretrained feature representations can be effectively adapted to the domain-specific challenges of LPTEM imaging through targeted fine-tuning on physics-informed synthetic training data.
